title: hilaria rigida
intro: Hilaria rigida, also known as Hilaria mutica or Desert Lavender, is a type of perennial grass native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds that provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Hilaria rigida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
